content:
Hello, when I run "make menuconfig" to configure the Kernel for RUST , the Rust support option does no appear under the General Support menu. I have included my kernel and Rust options below:

test@test:~/kernel-dev/linux-6.14.11$ rustc --version
rustc 1.88.0 (6b00bc388 2025-06-23)
test@test:~/kernel-dev/linux-6.14.11$ make kernelrelease
6.14.11
test@test:~/kernel-dev/linux-6.14.11$ lsb_release -a
No LSB modules are available.
Distributor ID: Debian
Description: Debian GNU/Linux 12 (bookworm)
Release: 12
Codename: bookworm
test@test:~/kernel-dev/linux-6.14.11$
Please see https://docs.kernel.org/rust/quick-start.html and make sure your toolchain is correctly set up with make rustavailable -- you may be missing bindgen or the stdlib sources.
